title: Sensitivity list on public_flat_rw attribute is redundant

features.name: public_flat_rw attribute with sensitivity list on signal
features.description: Code should include a signal declaration with verilator public_flat_rw attribute that has an explicit sensitivity list

features.name: public_flat_rw attribute without sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include a signal declaration with verilator public_flat_rw attribute without any sensitivity list
